findings.description: NEXT_SCENE routes to 'res://scenes/SceneRencontreMerlin.tscn' — director ordered deletion (q-20260414-005). After run ends, transition targets a to-be-deleted scene. Should be HubAntre.tscn.
_on_hub() routes to MerlinGame.tscn (orphan, merlin_game_controller.gd) when _merlin_found=true. Should always route to HubAntre.tscn.
MENU_SCENE := 'res://scenes/MenuPrincipal.tscn' — active menu is Menu3DPC.tscn. Stale constant.
NEXT_SCENE routes to SceneRencontreMerlin.tscn — director said delete both (q-20260414-005).
Routes to MenuPrincipal.tscn instead of Menu3DPC.tscn.
GameFlowController references HubScreen.tscn, Run3D.tscn, EndRunScreen.tscn — future architecture not yet wired into live game.

implementation_summary: P1 CRITICAL fix: Added _faction_cards_pool (20 faction cards loaded from data/cards/faction_fallback_cards.json). Wired MerlinReputationSystem.get_unlocked_content() into get_fastroute_card() via new _get_unlocked_faction_cards() helper. Faction cards now appear in pool only when player has rep >= 50 for that faction. Call-site grep PASS (2+ refs for all new functions).
invariants_checked: scene transitions use PixelTransition: PASS (4/4 hub transitions)
all referenced .tscn exist on disk: NEEDS VERIFICATION
